summary: Tested P0 Cancel Ticket, P1 Delivery Notes, and P2 Clear Tickets features. All backend tests passed (12/12). Fixed frontend bug where Cancel/Close buttons weren't showing due to role check using 'Requester' instead of specialty_name.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - Cancel/Close/Deliver buttons not showing because code checked user.role === 'Requester'/'Editor' but system uses specialty_name

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/orders/cancellation-reasons returns 6 reasons
Backend: Dashboard shows zero tickets (P2 verified)
Backend: Orders list is empty (P2 verified)
Backend: Requester can cancel Open ticket with reason and notes
Backend: Cancellation creates system message in timeline
Backend: Canceling assigned ticket notifies resolver
Backend: Cannot cancel Delivered ticket (400 error)
Backend: Cancel requires reason (422 validation)
Backend: Deliver requires resolution_notes (422 validation)
Backend: Deliver rejects empty resolution_notes (422 validation)
Backend: Delivery notes displayed in order detail
Backend: Delivery notes appear in timeline as message
Frontend: Cancel Ticket button visible for requester on active tickets
Frontend: Cancel modal shows reason dropdown with 6 options
Frontend: Cancel modal shows notes field
Frontend: Canceled ticket shows cancellation info (reason, notes, timestamp)
Frontend: System message appears in timeline after cancellation
Frontend: Mark as Delivered button visible for editor
Frontend: Delivery modal shows notes field with required indicator
Frontend: Confirm Delivery button disabled when notes empty
Frontend: Confirm Delivery button enabled after notes filled
Frontend: Delivered order shows Delivery Notes section
Frontend: Delivery notes visible in timeline
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: OrderDetail.js was checking user.role === 'Requester'/'Editor' but system uses specialty_name. Updated to check specialty_name for role-based permissions.
Cancel flow properly creates system message with reason and notes
Delivery flow properly requires resolution_notes and adds to timeline
All cancellation reasons from config.py are available in frontend dropdown
seed_data_creation: Created test orders during backend testing: TEST_Cancel Open Ticket, TEST_Cancel System Message, TEST_Cancel Assigned Ticket, TEST_Cannot Cancel Delivered, TEST_Cancel Requires Reason, TEST_Delivery Notes Required, TEST_Delivery Notes Display, TEST_Delivery Notes Timeline
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0/P1/P2 features all working. Cancel ticket flow: requester can cancel active tickets with reason dropdown (6 options from config.py) and optional notes. System message added to timeline. Delivery flow: editor must provide resolution_notes to deliver. Notes shown in order detail and timeline. Dashboard cleared (P2). Fixed frontend bug where role checks used 'Requester'/'Editor' instead of specialty_name.

fix_applied.issue: Role-based permission checks were using user.role === 'Requester'/'Editor' but system uses specialty_name
fix_applied.fix: Added isEditor, isRequester, isAdmin helper variables that check both role and specialty_name. Updated canPick, canSubmitForReview, canRespond, canDeliver, canAddFile, canClose, canCancel to use these helpers.
